data.body:
### Scenario Analysis (8 surviving scenarios)

- Decision-maker timeout on large story contexts (high, runtime): Opus latency may exceed ~73s ceiling; must set timeout: 600000 and apply context-budget cap
- Infinite revision loop (high, runtime): Cycle count must be persisted to survive context compaction; use tmp state file
- Sub-agent nesting violation (high, runtime): Decision-maker must include explicit nesting prohibition; may use Read/Grep/Glob but NOT Task dispatches
- Agent registration missing at first install (high, deployment): Agent .md + agent-routing.conf entry must ship in same commit
- ADR rationale omitted (medium, runtime): Output schema must require non-empty rationale; treat missing as REVISE signal
- Missing default for minimum proposal count (medium, config): Add implementation_plan.min_proposals config key (default 3)
- Partial rollout version mismatch (medium, deployment): Co-locate skill and agent changes in same commit
- Proposal deduplication failure (medium, runtime): Define distinctness heuristic for structural differentiation

### Planning Intelligence Log

- Web research (Step 2.6): triggered
  - Bright-line conditions that fired: novel architectural pattern (approach-selector agent pattern not established in codebase)
- Scenario analysis (Step 2.75): triggered
  - Scenarios surviving blue team filter: 8
- Practitioner-requested additional cycles: none
